_comment: Fair-compare diagnostic round: gpt-oss-20b low/medium at max_tokens=8192 to enable apples-to-apples comparison with Qwen thinking-on maxtok8k diagnostic (commit 7240eaa, avg 3.77 HF0). Existing gpt-oss dynamic baseline (composite 3.31, HF0) was run at default 2048 cap. Hypothesis: gpt-oss low/medium reasoning traces are short, so 8k budget should barely move scores. If scores rise notably, cap policy needs revisit; if verbose/fence/HF rises, 2048 production cap stability is reinforced.
_recommended_sequence: score each exact timestamped raw with prompts/test_suite_v0.3.json
construct dynamic composite per A/B/D=low, C=medium (medium D diagnostic only, excluded from composite)
_baseline_policy: Fair-compare diagnostic round to Qwen thinking-on maxtok8k (commit 7240eaa). Both models at max_tokens=8192. Dynamic composite (A/B/D from low, C from medium) constructed in report. Medium D excluded per §5.
_policy: Use default KV / default flash_attention for this round (env unset, verified).
max_tokens=8192 override only — all other inference options unchanged from v0.3 baseline.
Medium D scores must NOT enter the dynamic composite per §5; report as diagnostic-only.
Label discipline: results are NOT comparable to default-2048-cap gpt-oss dynamic baseline directly; comparison happens only at composite construction stage.

models.label: gpt-oss-20b-low-maxtok8k
models._role: fair-compare low — provides A/B/D for dynamic composite at maxtok8k

models.label: gpt-oss-20b-medium-maxtok8k
models._role: fair-compare medium — provides C for dynamic composite at maxtok8k; A/B/D recorded as diagnostic-only (medium D excluded from composite per §5)
